steps.title: Recognize what -4 represents in the function
steps.content: The function $t(x) = -4x + 68$ is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$. The value $-4$ is the slope, the coefficient of $x$.

steps.title: Interpret the slope as the rate of change
steps.content: In a linear function, the slope represents the rate of change. A slope of $-4$ means the estimated temperature decreases by 4 degrees Fahrenheit each hour. That matches The estimated temperature decreases 4 degrees Fahrenheit each hour., so A is correct.
